issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' (correct), but the activation cost '[Activate: Main]' and '[Once Per Turn]' restrictions are not represented in the DSL structure. The DSL lacks 'activation' and 'duration' fields required for proper Activated ability modeling.
AttachDon action is correct, but 'count:1' should reflect 'up to 1 rested DON!!' — the DSL does not specify the rested state requirement or 'up to' semantics.
Target should specify '{Kuja Pirates} type Leader or Character' — current scope 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader' is too broad and does not filter by type 'Kuja Pirates'.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and action 'PlaySelf' is completely erroneous. The card text contains no triggered effect that plays the card itself. This effect should be removed entirely.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] Give up to 1 rested DON!! card to 1 of your {Kuja Pirates} type Leader or Character cards.
